'''âz-ng-n''' ('''kazangan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:logjam|logjam]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ng-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:logjam|logjam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-ng-n
|-
! Lemma
| kazangan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizangan|thizangan]] || [[word:jizangan|jizangan]] || [[word:shizangan|shizangan]] || [[word:kizangan|kizangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzangan|thuthuzangan]] || [[word:jujuzangan|jujuzangan]] || [[word:shushuzangan|shushuzangan]] || [[word:kukuzangan|kukuzangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzangan|thuzangan]] || [[word:juzangan|juzangan]] || [[word:shuzangan|shuzangan]] || [[word:kuzangan|kuzangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzangan|thuzangan]] || [[word:juzangan|juzangan]] || [[word:shuzangan|shuzangan]] || [[word:kuzangan|kuzangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezangan|thezangan]] || [[word:jezangan|jezangan]] || [[word:shezangan|shezangan]] || [[word:kezangan|kezangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozangan|thothozangan]] || [[word:jojozangan|jojozangan]] || [[word:shoshozangan|shoshozangan]] || [[word:kokozangan|kokozangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozangan|thozangan]] || [[word:jozangan|jozangan]] || [[word:shozangan|shozangan]] || [[word:kozangan|kozangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozangan|thozangan]] || [[word:jozangan|jozangan]] || [[word:shozangan|shozangan]] || [[word:kozangan|kozangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzangan|thĂŠzangan]] || [[word:jĂŠzangan|jĂŠzangan]] || [[word:shĂŠzangan|shĂŠzangan]] || [[word:kĂŠzangan|kĂŠzangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazangan|thathazangan]] || [[word:jajazangan|jajazangan]] || [[word:shashazangan|shashazangan]] || [[word:kakazangan|kakazangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazangan|thazangan]] || [[word:jazangan|jazangan]] || [[word:shazangan|shazangan]] || [[word:kazangan|kazangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazangan|thazangan]] || [[word:jazangan|jazangan]] || [[word:shazangan|shazangan]] || [[word:kazangan|kazangan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazangan|shazangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazangan|goshazangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazangan|gokishazangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazanganĂŒ|shazanganĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazanganknĂŒ|goshazanganknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazanganĂŒ|gokishazanganĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazanganshĂ«|shazanganshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazangankshĂ«|goshazangankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazanganshĂ«|gokishazanganshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazanganro|shazanganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazangankro|goshazangankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazanganro|gokishazanganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazanganmu|shazanganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazangankmu|goshazangankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazanganmu|gokishazanganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazangansher|shazangansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazanganksher|goshazanganksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazangansher|gokishazangansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazangang|shazangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazangankng|goshazangankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazangang|gokishazangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazanganya|shazanganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazangankya|goshazangankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazanganya|gokishazanganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazanganyam|shazanganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazangankyam|goshazangankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazanganyam|gokishazanganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazanganĂŒshĂ«|shazanganĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazanganknĂŒshĂ«|goshazanganknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazanganĂŒshĂ«|gokishazanganĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazanganĂŒro|shazanganĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazanganknĂŒro|goshazanganknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazanganĂŒro|gokishazanganĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazanganĂŒmu|shazanganĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazanganknĂŒmu|goshazanganknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazanganĂŒmu|gokishazanganĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazanganshĂ«nĂŒ|shazanganshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazangankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazangankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazanganshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazanganshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazanganshĂ«ro|shazanganshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazangankshĂ«ro|goshazangankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazanganshĂ«ro|gokishazanganshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazanganshĂ«mu|shazanganshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazangankshĂ«mu|goshazangankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazanganshĂ«mu|gokishazanganshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazanganronĂŒ|shazanganronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazangankronĂŒ|goshazangankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazanganronĂŒ|gokishazanganronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazanganroshĂ«|shazanganroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazangankroshĂ«|goshazangankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazanganroshĂ«|gokishazanganroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazanganromu|shazanganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazangankromu|goshazangankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazanganromu|gokishazanganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazanganmunĂŒ|shazanganmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazangankmunĂŒ|goshazangankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazanganmunĂŒ|gokishazanganmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazanganmushĂ«|shazanganmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazangankmushĂ«|goshazangankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazanganmushĂ«|gokishazanganmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazanganmuro|shazanganmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazangankmuro|goshazangankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazanganmuro|gokishazanganmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
